examples: Therefore, performing the randomization itself takes up little extra memory.
A participant will usually be assigned to the standard group or the new group at random (called randomization).
Randomization of user input is currently conducted by zipSeries software, because, as a pilot project, WPT has limitations.
The randomization worked well and adherence to the diet was reasonable but not perfect (just as you might expect in practice).
It should be noted that all patients in FAME II underwent FFR prior to randomization, according to the original announcement of the trial.
